games.explanation: NYY is getting plus-money at +105 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Will Warren keeps NYY competitive on the mound against Ryan Pepiot. NYY holds a commanding 153-point Elo edge.
MIA is getting plus-money at +125 and the model thinks that's too cheap. MIA holds a commanding 87-point Elo edge.
Athletics is getting plus-money at +100 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Luis Morales toes the rubber against Anthony Kay. Slight run-scoring edge of 0.9 runs in the sim.
